Detailed Description

Represents a 2D lookup table for complex functions (text format).

Stores grid of sampled argument (arg) and function values (fun).

Definition at line 28 of file mathFunctions.h.

Construct a LookupTable from a text file.

Parameters
fileNamePath to the lookup table text file.

Reads sampled argument and function values into memory.
